title: Craftable Music Discs
description: This mod adds crafting recipes for music discs
body:
**This mod adds crafting recipes for music discs and also adds recipe to duplicate them.**

For recipes I recommend downloading [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei).

<details>
<summary>Compabilities</summary>

- [Alex's Mobs](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-mobs 'Curseforge link')
- [The Graveyard](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-graveyard-forge)
- [The Twilight Forest](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest 'Curseforge link')
- [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark)

</details>

If you want more compability mods or have any suggestions, message me on discord (fudgecz)
